declaration_time: after the 40k diagnostic and before the 50k checkpoint
scope: Operational Stage-C checkpoint selection; this is not a new learning Gate or an inferential claim.

lemat_calibration_panel.support_note: 500 is the complete PBEsol calibration support; PBE and SCAN are deterministically matched to it.

selection.normalization: candidate-panel min-max regret per objective; a constant objective contributes zero
selection.rule: discard ineligible and Pareto-dominated candidates, then minimize maximum normalized regret; break ties by mean normalized regret and then earlier Stage-C step
selection.teacher_feature_cosine: reported physical-transfer diagnostic, not a fifth correlated selection objective

boundaries: Selection starts at the v2 migration boundary; the v1 10k checkpoint remains an archived two-panel diagnostic, not a v2 operational candidate.
The selected checkpoint remains tensor-free GaugeFlow-base.
Selection does not authorize tensor conditioning, RL, relaxation, DFT, or DFPT.
The 10k-40k physical/A1 diagnostics remain valid two-panel evidence but are not relabelled as complete three-panel evaluations.
